allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== py launcher ==="; \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; try { py --version 2>&1 } catch { "no py" }; Write-Output "=== python3 ==="; \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== git identity ==="; git config --global user.name; git config --global user.email)
